stages.concept:
# Unit 138: 복합관계부사 whenever, wherever, however - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **복합관계부사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **whenever** — ~할 때마다, 언제든지 (= every time / no matter when)

> **Whenever** I see her, she smiles.
> 그녀를 볼 때마다, 그녀는 미소 짓는다.

> You can come **whenever** you want.
> 원할 때 언제든지 와도 된다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **wherever** — ~하는 곳이면 어디든지 (= no matter where)

> **Wherever** you go, I will follow you.
> 네가 어디를 가든지, 나는 너를 따라갈 것이다.

> Sit **wherever** you like.
> 좋아하는 어디든지 앉으세요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **however** — 아무리 ~하더라도 (= no matter how)

> **However** hard you try, you can't do it alone.
> 아무리 열심히 노력해도, 혼자서는 할 수 없다.

> **However** fast he runs, he can't catch the bus.
> 아무리 빨리 뛰어도, 그는 버스를 잡을 수 없다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: however 뒤에는 **형용사/부사**가 바로 와요!

> **However** + 형용사/부사 + 주어 + 동사

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"(       ) cold it is outside, I will go for a walk." (밖에 날씨가 아무리 춥더라도, 나는 산책을 갈 것이다.)
1. Wherever
2. Whenever
3. However ✅ 

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정답이에요! 뒤에 형용사(cold)가 바로 이어지고, '아무리 ~하더라도'라는 양보의 의미를 나타내므로 However가 들어가야 합니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: whenever(~할 때마다), wherever(어디든지), however(아무리 ~해도)! however 뒤에 형용사/부사가 바로 오는 것도 기억!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 138: 복합관계부사 whenever, wherever, however - 연습문제 A

**01.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
언제 도착하더라도 너는 따뜻한 음식을 먹을 수 있다.
(     ) you arrive, you can have warm food.
> **정답** Whenever

---

**02.** 어디에 가더라도 그녀는 행복하다.
(     ) she goes, she is happy.
> **정답** Wherever

---

**03.** 아무리 열심히 해도 그는 포기하지 않는다.
(     ) hard it is, he doesn't give up.
> **정답** However

---

**04.** 네가 원할 때면 언제든지 와.
Come (     ) you want.
> **정답** whenever

---

**05.** 네가 어디에 있든 전화해.
Call me (     ) you are.
> **정답** wherever

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Wherever you come, I will be here.
(언제든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Wherever → Whenever

---

**07.** Whenever she goes, she makes friends.
(어디에 가든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whenever → Wherever

---

**08.** However you go, call me.
(어디에 가든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** However → Wherever

---

**09.** Wherever hard he tries, he fails.
(아무리)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Wherever → However

---

**10.** However you are lonely, call me.
(~할 때면 언제든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** However → Whenever

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
언제든지 전화해.
Call me you want.
> **정답** whenever

---

**12.** 어디에 가든지 영어는 유용하다.
you go, English is useful.
> **정답** Wherever

---

**13.** 아무리 피곤해도 운동해라.
tired you are, exercise.
> **정답** However

---

**14.** 언제든지 도움이 필요하면 말해.
you need help, tell me.
> **정답** Whenever

---

**15.** 어디에 있든 행복해라.
you are, be happy.
> **정답** Wherever

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
언제든지 오고 싶으면 와.
Come whenever want you to
> **정답** Come / whenever / you / want / to

---

**17.** 어디에 가든지 그녀는 웃는다.
Wherever goes she she smiles
> **정답** Wherever / she / goes / she / smiles

---

**18.** 아무리 어려워도 포기하지 마.
However it hard is don't give up
> **정답** However / hard / it / is / don't / give / up

---

**19.** 배고플 때면 언제든지 먹어.
Eat whenever are you hungry
> **정답** Eat / whenever / you / are / hungry

---

**20.** 어디에 있든 전화해 줘.
Call wherever me you are
> **정답** Call / me / wherever / you / are
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 138: 복합관계부사 whenever, wherever, however - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
He ran into her whenever he went there.
→ He ran into her ____________ he went there.
at any place where
when
anything that
at any time when
> **정답** at any time when

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
However fast she ran, she couldn't catch the cat.
→ ______________ fast she ran, she couldn't catch
the cat.
How
No matter how
No matter who
No matter when
> **정답** No matter how

---

**03.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
Wherever you eat, you should keep your table
manners.
→ __________________ you eat, you should keep
your table manners.
No matter where
No matter what
No matter when
No matter how
> **정답** No matter where

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Whenever cold it is, he goes to the mountain.
He cries whenever he watches the movie.
He is happy whenever he goes to school.
Whenever she goes there, she takes her lunch
box.
> **정답** Whenever cold it is, he goes to the mountain.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
There are many students at any place
wherever he lectures.
He always washes his hands whenever he comes
home.
Wherever I am, I get along well with people.
No matter how hot it is, he doesn't drink cold
water.
> **정답** There are many students at any place wherever he lectures.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
There are forests at any place wherever wild
animals live.
The plant grows well no matter what it is
planted.
Whenever she sees him, she gets angry.
No matter how strange the food smells, it
tastes good.
> **정답** Whenever she sees him, she gets angry., No matter how strange the food smells, it tastes good.

---

**07.** 다음 중 빈칸에 wherever를 사용할 수 없는 것을
고르시오.
He carries a notebook _______ he goes.
_______ she is, she gets attention.
_______ our leader leads us, we will follow
him.
_______ does the job will succeed.
> **정답** _______ does the job will succeed.

---

**08.** 다음 중 빈칸에 whenever를 사용할 수 없는 것을
고르시오.
_______ they go there, the store is open.
_______ happens, she's not surprised.
_______ she arrives, she can see me.
_______ he sleeps, he wakes up at 7 a.m.
> **정답** _______ happens, she's not surprised.

---

**09.** 다음 중 빈칸에 however를 사용할 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
________ much they shouted, she couldn't
hear it.
________ you hide it, I can find it.
________ I put the food, the dog ate it.
________ you study, you should focus on it.
> **정답** ________ much they shouted, she couldn't hear it.

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
네가 그 물건을 어디서 주웠더라도, 다시 제자리에 돌려놔라.
_______ you picked it up, put it back in place.
However
Wherever
Whenever
Where
> **정답** Wherever

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
나는 아무리 늦게 자도, 정각에 일어난다.
_______ late I sleep, I wake up on time.
However
Whoever
Wherever
How
> **정답** However

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그는 우리를 만날 때마다 같은 모자를 쓰고 있었다.
He wore the same hat _______ he met us.
when
wherever
whenever
however
> **정답** whenever

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
내가 소풍을 갈 때면 언제나 비가왔다.
No matter when I went on a picnic, it always
rained.
It always rained at any time when I went on a
picnic.
Whenever I went on a picnic, it always rained.
It always rained, at any time whenever I went
on a picnic.
> **정답** Whenever I went on a picnic, it always rained., It always rained at any time when I went on a picnic.

---

**14.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그녀는 여행하는 곳 어디든지 친구를 사귀었다.
She made friends no matter where she
traveled.
She made friends wherever she traveled.
She made friends at any time when she
traveled.
She made friends at any place where she
traveled.
> **정답** She made friends wherever she traveled., She made friends at any place where she traveled.

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그 산이 아무리 높아도, 사람들은 산 정상에 올랐다.
However the mountain was high, people
climbed to the top of the mountain.
No matter how high the mountain was, people
climbed to the top of the mountain.
No matter how the mountain was high,
people climbed to the top of the mountain.
However high the mountain was, people
climbed to the top of the mountain.
> **정답** No matter how high the mountain was, people climbed to the top of the mountain.
> **정답However high the mountain was, people climbed to the top of the mountain.

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
나는 여름에 어딜 가더라도 우산을 가져간다.
I take an umbrella wherever I go in summer.
I take an umbrella whenever I go in summer.
I take an umbrella however I go in summer.
I take an umbrella, no matter where I go in
summer.
> **정답** I take an umbrella wherever I go in summer., I take an umbrella, no matter where I go in summer.

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
_______ hard he tries, he can't finish the work.
He kept smiling _______ he was.
However - wherever
However - however
Whenever - wherever
Wherever - however
> **정답** However - wherever

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
_______ he goes, I will follow him.
_______ difficult he read the book, he can understand
it.
Whenever - However
Wherever - Wherever
Wherever - However
Wherever - Whenever
> **정답** Wherever - However

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Wherever he came to school,
he forgot to bring a book.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Wherever → Whenever

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
No matter when heavy the bag
was, he didn't ask anyone
for help.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** when → how
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 138 복합관계부사 whenever, wherever, however중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
Alex는 어디를 가든지 텀블러를 가지고 다닌다.
Alex carries a tumbler  (     )  he goes.
정답 wherever

---

**02.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 아무리 기분이 나빠도, 화를 내지 않는다.
 bad he feels, he doesn't get angry.
정답 However

---

**03.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그 배가 도착할 때마다 뱃고동 소리가 요란하게 울렸다.
The boat horn rang loudly  (     )  the ship arrived,
정답 whenever

---

**04.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
내가 개의 이름을 부를 때마다 그 개는 꼬리를 흔들었다.
The dog wagged its tail  (     )   (     )  
 I called the dog's name.
정답 at, any, time, when

---

**05.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그 영화가 상영되는 곳 어디에나 많은 사람이 모였다.
Many people gathered  (     )   (     )   (     )  
the movie was screened.
정답 at, any, place, where

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 개는 아무리 열심히 땅을 팠어도 뼈다귀를 찾지 못했다.
[hard, the dog, dig]
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
, he couldn't find the bone.
정답 No, matter, how, hard, the, dog, dug

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 그 경기가 어디에서 열렸더라도 그곳에 꼭 갔다.
[the game, be held]
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
, she went there .
정답 No, matter, where, the, game, was, held

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 언제 수영을 하더라도 항상 준비운동을 한다. [swim]
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I always
warm up.
정답 No, matter, when, I, swim

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
Lisa가 아무리 어려도 이것은 할 수 있다.
[how] [Lisa] [can]
[matter] [do] [is,] [No]
[young] [she] [this.]
정답 No / matter / how / young / Lisa / is, / she / can /
do / this.

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그 소녀는 바다에 갈 때마다 조개 껍질을 주워 온다.
[picks up] [goes to] [shells]
[the sea.] [whenever] [The girl]
[she]
정답 The girl / picks up / shells / whenever / she / goes to /
the sea.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 138: 복합관계부사 whenever, wherever, however - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She ran into him whenever she went there.
→ She ran into him ____________ she went there. at any place where when anything that at any time when
> 정답: at any time when

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
However hard he studied, he couldn't pass the test. → ______________ hard he studied, he couldn't pass the test.
How No matter how No matter who No matter when
> 정답: No matter how

---

**03.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Wherever you sit, you should be respectful. → __________________ you sit, you should be respectful.
No matter where No matter what No matter when No matter how
> 정답: No matter where

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Whenever tired it is, she goes to the gym.
He smiles whenever he watches the show.
She is cheerful whenever she goes to school.
Whenever he goes there, he brings his camera.
> 정답: Whenever tired it is, she goes to the gym.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
There are many fans at any place wherever she performs.
He always takes off his shoes whenever he enters the house.
Wherever I am, I get along well with neighbors.
No matter how cold it is, she doesn't wear a heavy coat.
> 정답: There are many students at any place wherever he lectures.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
There are parks at any place wherever wild birds live.
The tree grows well no matter what it is planted.
Whenever he sees her, he gets nervous.
No matter how odd the dish looks, it tastes great.
> 정답: Whenever she sees him, she gets angry., No matter how strange the food smells, it tastes good.

---

**07.** 다음 중 빈칸에 wherever를 사용할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
She carries her diary _______ she goes.
_______ he is, he gets attention.
_______ our teacher leads us, we will follow her . _______ finishes the task will succeed.
> 정답: _______ finishes the task will succeed.

---

**08.** 다음 중 빈칸에 whenever를 사용할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
_______ they visit there, the café is open.
_______ happens, he's not worried. _______ she arrives, she can see me. _______ he sleeps, he wakes up at 6 a.m.
> 정답: _______ happens, he's not worried.

---

**09.** 다음 중 빈칸에 however를 사용할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
________ much they yelled, he couldn't hear it.
________ you hide it, I can find it .
________ I put the snack, the cat ate it .
________ you practice, you should concentrate.
> 정답: ________ much they yelled, he couldn't hear it.

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
네가 그 물건을 어디서 찾았더라도, 다시 제자리에 돌려놔라. _______ you found it, put it back in place.
However Wherever Whenever Where
> 정답: Wherever

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
나는 아무리 일찍 자도, 정각에 일어난다. _______ early I sleep, I wake up on time.
However Whoever Wherever How
> 정답: However

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그녀는 우리를 만날 때마다 같은 가방을 들고 있었다.
She carried the same bag _______ she met us. when wherever whenever however
> 정답: whenever

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
내가 캠핑을 갈 때면 언제나 비가 왔다.
No matter when I went camping, it always rained.
It always rained at any time when I went camping.
Whenever I went camping, it always rained.
It always rained, at any time whenever I went camping.
> 정답: Whenever I went camping, it always rained., It always rained at any time when I went camping.

---

**14.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그는 여행하는 곳 어디든지 사진을 찍었다.
He took photos no matter where he traveled.
He took photos wherever he traveled.
He took photos at any time when he traveled.
He took photos at any place where he traveled.
> 정답: She made friends wherever she traveled., She made friends at any place where she traveled.

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그 건물이 아무리 높아도, 사람들은 꼭대기에 올랐다.
However the building was tall, people climbed to the top.
No matter how tall the building was, people climbed to the top.
No matter how the building was tall, people climbed to the top.
However tall the building was, people climbed to the top.
> 정답: No matter how high the mountain was, people climbed to the top of the mountain.
> 정답: However high the mountain was, people climbed to the top of the mountain.

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
나는 겨울에 어딜 가더라도 장갑을 가져간다.
I take gloves wherever I go in winter.
I take gloves whenever I go in winter.
I take gloves however I go in winter.
I take gloves, no matter where I go in winter.
> 정답: I take an umbrella wherever I go in summer., I take an umbrella, no matter where I go in summer.

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
_______ busy he is, he can't skip the practice.
He stayed calm _______ he was.
However - wherever However - however Whenever - wherever Wherever - however
> 정답: However - wherever

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
_______ she goes, I will go with her. _______ challenging the task is, she can complete it.
Whenever - However Wherever - Wherever Wherever - However Wherever - Whenever
> 정답: Wherever - However

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Wherever  she  came  to  school, she  forgot  to  bring  her  notebook. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: Wherever → Whenever

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. No  matter  when  large  the  box was,  she  didn  't  ask  anyone for  help. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: when → how
